series_metadata.series_description: Records include correspondence sent as notifications to external customers regarding any decisions made by our agency concerning the customer''s threats against any agency employee or the customer''s harassment of agency employees and/or hindrance of normal business operations, including notice of any possible legal action that may be taken (by our agency against the customer) should violations of the notice occur.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 30 days after abatement letter is issued, prepped, scan (image), quality control is complete then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for 3 years after abatement letter is issued or last activity, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
